text:
nd to bring balanced thoughts. It is a well known fact that
mind can never be kept thought less in a wakeful state. In wakeful
state mind is restless, with thoughts coming like the waves in the
ocean. When mind experiences agony, man becomes stunned and
practically experiences a sort of helplessness. An astrologer
studying the horoscope or the prashna chart can understand the
position of mind, and what is lacking and what is needed by native.
This is how astrology is a great science which can guide a native
in distress.
In Sanskrit it is said that in ether, there are elements called
AAP It is these elements which enable an astrologer to tender
advice to the native. With the advice, the flow of thoughts begin
to raise/i.e. there is an elevation of thoughts to higher planes and
mind begins to balance and reach a same order. In such a state
of mind, solutions to the problems can be found easily. That is how
natives can be guided in their times of distress.
